visual_analysis.description: A clear plastic water bottle with a blue cap, positioned behind three other objects.
A yellow lemon located in the very front, blocking access to the cans and the bottle.
A green Sprite can, positioned behind the lemon and in front of the water bottle.
A red Coca-Cola can, positioned behind the lemon and in front of the water bottle.
The wooden surface where all the objects are placed.

action_plan.explanation: The yellow lemon is the most frontal object and must be removed first to clear the path to the objects behind it.
The green soda can is directly in front of the water bottle and must be removed to gain access.
The red soda can also obstructs the path to the water bottle and needs to be cleared.
All obstacles have been cleared, and the water bottle is now accessible.
